name: Pearlmeadow
personality: Pearlmeadow dons the wizard hat of a capybara who genuinely believes in the magic of breakpoints — its ° eyes focus on the call stack with the intensity of a spell being cast. Understanding why the code was written this way is left as an exercise for the reader.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
